film.title: The Manchurian Candidate
film.overview: Years after his squad was ambushed during the Gulf War, Major Ben Marco finds himself having terrible nightmares. He begins to doubt that his fellow squad-mate Sergeant Raymond Shaw, now a vice-presidential candidate, is the hero he remembers him being. As Marco's doubts deepen, Shaw's political power grows, and, when Marco finds a mysterious implant embedded in his back, the memory of what really happened begins to return.

dialogues.dialogue: Excuse me, when have I ever attacked Senator Jordan, despite... Despite what?  Despite what?  Despite the shameful way his daughter toyed with you  that summer at the shore.  You chased her away, Mother, let's not have any illusions about... She wasn't in your league, but if that's the way you choose to remember it... You destroyed any possibility of us ever... Honey, you are oversimplifying things a little bit, but it's okay.
dialogues.cause_raw: belittling and shaming her child's past relationship
